calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. RICHARD BOONE CALLAWAY, Esq. of Callaway & Wolf (tel: 415-541-0300) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JOSHUA BRADUS, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BREITLING USA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Breitling USA, Inc.'s ("Breitling") Motion to Strike the Complaint is denied. Plaintiff's allegations that support the intentional torts also support the prayer for exemplary damages. As explained in the companion demurrer, Breitling may be liable for Valencia's conduct. Plaintiff's Ralph Act claim supports the attorney's fees request. (Civil Code sections 51.7, 52(b)(3).) Defendant notes that the fee request is not directly tied to the Ralph Act cause of action. Any ambiguity is minor; any fee request will be resolved by a subsequent motion after the case is adjudicated.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. RICHARD BOONE CALLAWAY, Esq. of Callaway & Wolf (tel: 415-541-0300) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JOSHUA BRADUS, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BREITLING USA's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Breitling USA, Inc.'s ("Breitling") Demurrer to the Complaint is overruled (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BREITLING USA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

The court continues the matter for hearing on its own motion to March 25, 2025. Defendant is ordered to provide courtesy copies of its papers consistent with Local Rule 2.7(B) forthwith, accompanied by a cover letter showing the new hearing date
